case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. VINCENTE BIRCH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,040.70 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BIRCH, VINCENTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.99) SERVED JUN-14-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIRCH, VINCENTE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRCH, VINCENTE $4,040.70 PRINCIPAL, $65.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,106.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
